title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TNT India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
